mainEntity.name: Risks of relying on ChatGPT recommendations for Houston clients?
mainEntity.text: Risks of relying on ChatGPT recommendations for Houston clients?

acceptedAnswer.text: Risks include outdated info, no vetting of ethics violations, and bias toward high-SEO firms over best Houston lawyers.

suggestedAnswer.text: Advise clients: Cross-check bar status, consult multiples. For lawyers, over-reliance harms reputation if AI errs.

name: Risks of ChatGPT Houston Lawyer Recs
description: Risks include outdated info, no vetting of ethics violations, and bias toward high-SEO firms over best Houston lawyers.
